description_long: This object is a rectangular toolbox with a robust, industrial design, featuring a wooden body encased in a metallic frame. The wood panels are horizontally aligned on the longer sides and vertically aligned on the shorter ends, giving it a visually structured appearance. The metallic frame appears to be made of brushed steel or aluminum, providing both structural support and a modern aesthetic. The top surface is flat and bordered by the same metallic material, suggesting it could double as a small work surface. There are no visible handles, latches, or external compartments, indicating a minimalist design. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for urban environments such as garages, workshops, or construction sites.
description: A rectangular, wood-paneled toolbox with a sturdy metallic frame and a minimalist, industrial design. The flat top and seamless sides suggest a durable, modern storage solution.
description_view_0: End view showing vertical wood panels framed by metal, with no visible handles or latches.
description_view_1: Side view displaying horizontally aligned wood panels within a metallic frame, emphasizing the box's length.
description_view_2: Opposite end view, identical to view 0, with vertical wood panels and a metal border.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, with horizontal wood panels and a metallic frame.
attribute_handle_type: No visible handles; the design does not show any fixed, folding, or retractable handles for carrying or moving.
attribute_latch_mechanism: No visible latch or locking mechanism; the exterior appears seamless with no clasps, snaps, or locks.
attribute_compartment_configuration: No internal or external compartments, trays, or dividers are visible; the box appears to be a single, undivided container.
